summary: Iter 59 backend: 19/19 pytest tests passed. All P0/P1 backend features verified: attendance-sheet alias + new endpoint + group filter, Masters CRUD (group/department/designation) with 409 dup guard + PATCH member update + DELETE, firm-wise Compliance Policy PUT/GET roundtrip + sub_admin 403, Bonus rate clamping (25→20, 5→8.33), Bonus preview formula (basic~10000 → 6997.2, over-cap gross 60000→basic 30000 → eligible=false + amount=0), Bonus XLSX report download with correct content-type + non-empty body, sub_admin can call POST /bonus-runs and GET /admin/employees, and Resend integration returns delivered:true + email_id (new RESEND_API_KEY works). Frontend: all 4 new expo-router routes (/attendance-sheet, /masters, /compliance-policy, /bonus-run) resolve (HTTP 200) and render the correct super-admin gate messages — no red screens, no bundler errors. Code review found ONE real integration bug in attendance-sheet.tsx: file upload reads wrong localStorage key.

ui_bugs.issue: XLSX file upload uses wrong localStorage key. Line 172 reads `localStorage.getItem('session_token')` but the token is actually stored under `llc_session_token` (see /app/frontend/src/api/client.ts:5 `TOKEN_KEY = 'llc_session_token'`). Result: Authorization header is empty → the POST /api/admin/attendance-sheet/upload call always returns 401 for web users. Fix: change to `getItem('llc_session_token')` or better, import and use `readAuthToken()` from `@/src/api/client`.

integration_issues.issue: Auth token missing due to wrong localStorage key — feature unusable on web.

action_items: FIX /app/frontend/app/attendance-sheet.tsx:172 — replace `localStorage.getItem('session_token')` with `localStorage.getItem('llc_session_token')` (or use `readAuthToken()` from @/src/api/client). Currently every attendance-sheet XLSX upload fails with 401 on web.

Note: PATCH /admin/user-role does NOT support `basic_salary` update (only salary_monthly, doj, exit_date, etc — see server.py:8945-8951). If the frontend needs to set employee-level basic separately from gross, extend RoleUpdate to accept basic_salary. The bonus preview formula still works because the backend derives basic from gross × basic_percent_of_gross when basic is 0, but you may want an explicit override.

Consider adding a lightweight `/api/admin/companies?fields=company_id,name,company_code` variant — the /api/companies list is super_admin-only and includes heavy per-firm stats which slows the picker on /masters, /compliance-policy, /bonus-run screens.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 11642 lines — refactor into modules is critical.
MasterUpsert (server.py:11090) requires type/company_id/name on PATCH too, which forces the client to always resend those on updates. Consider a separate MasterPatch model with all Optional fields.

_compute_bonus_run treats `basic_salary` as Basic+DA proxy but the field name on the user doc is just `basic_salary`. Add a short docstring/comment clarifying which field is used and how the fallback (gross × basic_percent_of_gross) is applied so future readers don't get confused.

The bonus report XLSX (server.py:11559) puts the ₹ symbol in strings — the file opens fine in Excel but a very old locale might garble it. Consider using `Rs.` or letting Excel format currency cells via a number_format.

compliance-policy PUT endpoint replaces the whole policy dict every time — if the caller PUTs {pf_employee_rate:12} it wipes previously-set esic_employee_rate. Consider merging with the existing policy like the bonus-policy PUT does (server.py:11352-11358 does a merge, but compliance-policy PUT at 11255 does NOT).
Deprecated warning: 'shadow*' style props are logged from many screens (RN Web deprecation). Not blocking, but should be migrated to `boxShadow` at some point.

success_rate.frontend: 4/4 new expo-router routes resolve (200) and render correct guard messages. 1 real bug found via code review (wrong localStorage key in upload flow — will manifest at runtime for web super-admin).

seed_data_creation: None. Every test cleans up after itself: master docs are DELETEd, sub-admins removed via DELETE /admin/sub-admins, and the modified sample employee (Ramesh Kumar in SKSCO1) has basic_salary/salary_monthly/doj restored to original values.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) `/api/companies` returns `{companies: [...]}` (not `items`). 2) `/api/admin/employees?company_id=X` returns `{employees: [...]}`. 3) Sub-admin creation requires `password` field (SubAdminCreate model). 4) `/admin/user-role` PATCH does NOT accept `basic_salary` — only salary_monthly, doj, department, position, employee_code, name, father_name, dob, designation, present_address, permanent_address, shift_start, shift_end, half_day_hrs, full_day_hrs, exit_date, is_live_in, auto_punch_enabled, role, company_id. 5) SKSCO1 (cmp_5a46bfa20b) has at least 1 employee (Ramesh Kumar SK-EMP-001, salary_monthly=27777). 6) Frontend uses `llc_session_token` in localStorage, NOT `session_token`.
rca_of_issue: ATTENDANCE-SHEET UPLOAD 401 BUG: The renamed /attendance-sheet.tsx (line 172) still references the old key `session_token`, whereas the canonical auth helper `saveToken()` in /app/frontend/src/api/client.ts stores under `llc_session_token`. This means the `Authorization: Bearer ...` header is never populated for the upload POST, and the backend returns 401 to any user (including super_admin). Reproduction: 1) Log in as super_admin. 2) Go to /attendance-sheet. 3) Click 'Upload existing XLSX' — you'll see 'Upload failed (401)'. Fix: replace line 172 with `localStorage.getItem('llc_session_token')` OR (cleaner) `import { readAuthToken } from '@/src/api/client'` and use it. Note: the sibling flow that DOWNLOADS the pre-filled attendance sheet works because it uses `api()` helper which reads from the right key.
